ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "new_deaths_smoothed_per_million" REAL /* Smoothed rate of new deaths per million population */,
  "reproduction_rate" REAL /* Estimated reproduction rate of the virus */,
  "new_tests_smoothed_per_thousand" REAL /* Smoothed rate of new tests per thousand population */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "tests_per_case" REAL /* Average number of tests per confirmed case */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred" REAL /* Percentage of population fully vaccinated */,
  "new_vaccinations_smoothed_per_million" REAL /* Smoothed rate of new vaccinations per million population */,
  "stringency_index" REAL /* Index representing the stringency of public health measures */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred_2" REAL /* Alternative representation of percentage of population fully vaccinated */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths up to the recorded date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases up to the recorded date */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted up to the recorded date */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered up to the recorded date */,
  "vaccination_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when a significant percentage of the population is fully vaccinated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, CDC, local health authorities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the vaccination data is recorded */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred" REAL /* Percentage of population fully vaccinated */,
  "new_vaccinations_smoothed_per_million" REAL /* Smoothed rate of new vaccinations per million population */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered up to the recorded date */,
  "vaccines_used" TEXT /* Types of vaccines used in the country */,
  "vaccination_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when a significant percentage of the population is fully vaccinated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, CDC, local health authorities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the testing data is recorded */,
  "new_tests_smoothed_per_thousand" REAL /* Smoothed rate of new tests per thousand population */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted up to the recorded date */,
  "testing_type" TEXT /* Types of tests conducted (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, CDC, local health authorities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stringency_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stringency measure entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the stringency index is recorded */,
  "stringency_index" REAL /* Index representing the stringency of public health measures */,
  "lockdown_status" TEXT /* Status of lockdown (e.g., partial, full) */,
  "travel_restrictions" TEXT /* Status of travel restrictions (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "school_closures" TEXT /* Status of school closures (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "public_events" TEXT /* Status of public events (e.g., allowed, restricted) */,
  "workplace_closures" TEXT /* Status of workplace closures (e.g., essential only, closed) */,
  "public_transport" TEXT /* Status of public transport (e.g., reduced, normal) */,
  "stay_home_requirements" TEXT /* Status of stay-at-home requirements (e.g., recommended, mandated) */,
  "information_campaigns" TEXT /* Status of information campaigns (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stringency_measures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
